current_entries.en_definition: (hence, medicine) A medical implement that is used to stimulate a heart to beat by simulating the action of the natural pacemaker.

current_entries.en_definition: (now, uncommon) One who sets the pace in a race, to guide the others.

A small pack or package; a little bundle or parcel
A religious building in South and Southeast Asia, especially a multi-storey tower erected as a Hindu or Buddhist temple. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: That is a pagoda.
examples.chinese: 那是一座宝塔。

current_entries.en_definition: A chemical element (symbol Pd) with an atomic number of 46: a rare, lustrous silvery-white metal.
Trashy, trivial, of little value.
(British, slang) Of inferior quality, rubbish.

(chiefly, North America, Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, India, Philippines) An outer garment that covers the body from the waist downwards, covering each leg separately, usually as far as the ankles; trousers. [from 19th c.]
(chiefly, UK) An undergarment that covers the genitals and often the buttocks and the neighbouring parts of the body; underpants. [from 19th c.]

A package wrapped for shipment.

Very thirsty.

current_entries.en_definition: (derogatory) Characterized by an unsophisticated focus on local concerns to the exclusion of wider contexts; elementary in scope or outlook.

(transitive) To distribute.
That passes away; ephemeral. [from 14th c.]

examples.english: He amazed everyone by passing his driving test.

current_entries.en_definition: (now, _, rare, literary) Pre-eminent, excellent, extreme. [from 14th c.]
Vague, cursory. [from 18th c.]
(literary, or, archaic) Surpassingly, greatly. [from 14th c.]
Death, dying; the end of something. [from 14th c.]
The fact of going past; a movement from one place to another or a change from one state to another. [from 14th c.]
Dough made from wheat and water and sometimes mixed with egg and formed into various shapes; often sold in dried form and typically boiled for eating.

examples.english: The herb used in that pasta sauce might be parsley.

The belly of a human, especially a large, fat protruding one.
Not at war; not disturbed by strife or turmoil.
Motionless and calm.
A type of fruit tree (Pyrus communis).

current_entries.en_definition: Of, or relating to, money; monetary, financial.
A lead projectile used as ammunition in rifled air guns.
(clocks, mechanics) A body suspended from a fixed support so that it swings freely back and forth under the influence of gravity, commonly used to regulate various devices such as clocks.
A lowly person; a peasant or serf; a labourer who is obliged to do menial work.
(organic compound) Any of a class of organic compounds consisting of various numbers of amino acids in which the amine of one is reacted with the carboxylic acid of the next to form an amide bond.
(chiefly, North America) That's final; that's the end of the matter (analogous to a period ending a sentence); end of story.

examples.english: The students' lunch period is from twelve to one.
examples.chinese: 學生的午飯時間是十二點到一點。

current_entries.en_definition: (now, chiefly, North America, Philippines) The punctuation mark “.” (indicating the ending of a sentence or marking an abbreviation).
The length of time during which the same characteristics of a periodic phenomenon recur, such as the repetition of a wave or the rotation of a planet. [from 17th c.]
(chemistry) A row in the periodic table of the elements. [from 19th c.]
(geology) A geochronologic unit of millions to tens of millions of years; a subdivision of an era, and subdivided into epochs.

current_entries.zh_definition: 营 业 执 照
current_entries.en_definition: An artifact or document rendering something allowed or legal. [from 17th c.]

examples.english: Will you permit me to go there?

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To allow (someone) to do something; to give permission to. [from 15th c.]
(transitive) To be guilty of, or responsible for a crime etc; to commit.

The orange fruit of any of various species of trees in the genus Diospyros, especially Diospyros kaki (the kaki or Japanese persimmon) or Diospyros virginiana (the wild American persimmon), which is sweet when ripe and astringent when immature.
The tree this fruit grows on, generally one of two species of ebony: Diospyros kaki (Asian) or Diospyros virginiana (North American).
(in a compound noun or noun phrase) A human of unspecified gender (in terms usually constructed with man or woman).

examples.english: Each person is a world.

current_entries.en_definition: Of a person: having a pleasant manner; amiable, friendly.
The action or process of perspiring.
(transitive) To read completely.
(intransitive, originally, US) Synonym of peter (“to diminish to nothing, (originally) to refer to a vein of ore”).
A minor, less serious crime.
An expression of disgust in response to an unpleasant odor.
Any structure shaped like a church pew, such as a stall, formerly used by money lenders, etc.; a box in a theatre; or a pen or sheepfold.
(anatomy) The part of the alimentary canal and respiratory tract that extends from the back of the mouth and nasal cavity to the larynx and esophagus.
(slang, originally, AAVE) Excellent; cool; very good.
(chemistry) a chemical element (symbol P) with an atomic number of 15, that exists in several allotropic forms.
A heavy iron tool with a wooden handle; one end of the head is pointed, the other has a chisel edge.
One who steals from the pocket of a passerby, usually by sleight of hand.

examples.chinese: 幾位見義勇為的乘客把小偷抓住了，還把他送到了警方的手中。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To represent in or with a picture.

examples.chinese: 画框比画還值錢。

current_entries.en_definition: A personal share of a limited resource.
A raised platform built from the shore out over water, supported on piles; used to secure, or provide access to shipping; a jetty.
A structure supporting the junction between two spans of a bridge.

A young pig.

current_entries.en_definition: (nautical) A pin or bolt, usually vertical, which acts as a pivot for a hinge or a rudder.
(particle) Any of three semistable mesons, having positive, negative or neutral charge, composed of up and down quarks/antiquarks.
Stimulating to the senses; engaging; charming. [from 17th c.]
Favorably stimulating to the palate; pleasantly spicy; tangy. [from 17th c.]
Of, pertaining to, or characteristic of fish; ichthyic.
Concise and meaningful.
A card set down at a table to inform a guest (named on the card) where they are to sit.
(military) A unit of thirty to forty soldiers typically commanded by a lieutenant and forming part of a company.

The hard surface of a turntable on which a gramophone record rests when being played.

(sewing) A fold in the fabric of a garment, usually a skirt, as a part of the design of the garment, with the purpose of adding controlled fullness and freedom of movement, or taking up excess fabric. There are many types of pleats, differing in their construction and appearance.
(transitive) To form one or more pleats in a piece of fabric or a garment.
Existing in large number or ample amount.

examples.english: She shed plentiful tears when her beloved dog was killed in an accident.
examples.chinese: 她目睹愛犬在意外中離世，不禁淚如泉湧。

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, _, biology) To fold or pleat (usually used in passive).
(British spelling) The cutting edge of a plough, typically a metal blade.
Any of various wading birds of the subfamily Charadriinae.

(ornithology, collective noun) Layer or collection of feathers covering a bird’s body; feathers used ornamentally; feathering.
A metal weight attached to the end of a plumb line.

current_entries.en_definition: Having no prominent or important feature, as of an argument, discourse, etc.

The large fruit of the Citrus maxima (syn. C. grandis), native to South Asia and Southeast Asia, with a thick green or yellow rind, a thick white pith, and semi-sweet translucent pale flesh.

Relating to the collection, sorting and delivery of mail.

A practice of communicating with one's God, or with some spiritual entity.

A request; a petition.
Before; earlier in time; beforehand.

current_entries.en_definition: (UK) A pedestrianized and uncovered shopping area.

A model or type of machinery or device which precedes the current (or later) one. Usually used to describe an earlier, outdated model.

quod vide; which see (advises the reader to look up a mentioned text for further information).

Used other than figuratively or idiomatically: see rabbit,‎ hole. The entrance to a rabbit warren or burrow; the whole warren or burrow.

The chemical element (symbol Ra) with an atomic number of 88. It is a soft, shiny and silvery radioactive alkaline earth metal.

examples.english: It is very important for us to love a river.
examples.chinese: 對於我們來說愛惜河川是很重要的。

A way used for travelling between places, originally one wide enough to allow foot passengers and horses to travel, now (US) usually one surfaced with asphalt or concrete and designed to accommodate many vehicles travelling in both directions. In the UK both senses are heard: a country road is the same as a country lane. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: Look out! There's a hole in the road.

current_entries.en_definition: (hyperbolic, idiom, chiefly in the negative) One qualified to handle or understand things which are very complex or confusing; a very intelligent person.

An ancient Roman unit of itinerant distance of 1000 paces (mille passus, hence also "mile" from Latin mille, "1000"). Indirectly standardized to 5000 Roman feet by Agrippa in 29 BC. In modern times, Agrippa's Imperial Roman mile is empirically estimated to have been around 1481 meters (1620 yards, 4860 English feet, 0.92 English miles); compared with a modern mile, which is 5280 feet.
(obsolete) A ridge tile, A tile for the ridge of a roof.
(agriculture) A healthy and vigorous-rooted plant that is used in grafting, most commonly as a sound base to support a scion that bears desirable fruit in orchard culture.
The projecting prow of a rowed warship, such as a trireme.
(finance) Тhe movement of investments between different sectors of an economy, or styles of investing, based on anticipated changes in the economic or market cycle.
(cooking) A type of sauce from Provence, France, often served with fish dishes, consisting of egg yolk and olive oil with breadcrumbs, chili peppers, garlic, and saffron.
Having a rounded upper back, and shoulders that bend forward.
A line of objects, often regularly spaced, such as seats in a theatre, vegetable plants in a garden, etc.
A noisy argument.
A continual loud noise.
(transitive, or, intransitive, nautical) To propel (a boat or other craft) over water using oars.
(intransitive) To argue noisily.
The action of the verb to row.

examples.english: Let's take turns rowing the boat.
examples.chinese: 讓我們輪流划船。

current_entries.en_definition: The chemical element (symbol Rb) with an atomic number of 37. It is a soft, highly reactive alkali metal.
Reddish in color, especially of the face, fire, or sky.

examples.english: My beloved is white and ruddy, chosen out of thousands.
examples.chinese: 我所爱的是白皙红润，千里挑一的。

current_entries.en_definition: Not neat or regular; irregular, uneven.

examples.english: The rugged terrain made the troops' advance difficult.
examples.chinese: 地面高低不平，給部隊前進帶來了困難。

current_entries.en_definition: (of temper, character, or people) Harsh; austere; hard
(of weather) Stormy; turbulent; tempestuous
To leave; to make one's way somewhere else.
(transitive, intransitive, of a train) To have a route that goes through an area; to continue through an area; to complete a route.
A narrow board serving as a step beneath the doors of some cars.
A metallic chemical element (symbol Ru) with an atomic number of 44.
A transuranic chemical element (symbol Rf) with an atomic number of 104.
Characterized by solemn religious ceremony or religious use, especially, in a positive sense; consecrated, made holy.

examples.english: In India, the cow is a sacred animal.
examples.chinese: 在印度，牛是一種神聖的動物。

current_entries.en_definition: The difference in elevation of a wire, cable, chain or rope suspended between two consecutive points.
(by extension) To lean, give way, or settle from a vertical position.

(figuratively) To lose firmness, elasticity, vigor, or a thriving state; to sink; to droop; to flag; to bend; to yield, as the mind or spirits, under the pressure of care, trouble, doubt, or the like; to be unsettled or unbalanced.
The quality of being sage, wise, or able to make good decisions; the quality of being perceptive, astute or insightful. [from 16th c.]
An exchange of goods or services for currency or credit.

examples.english: Grand opening sale.
examples.chinese: 开业庆典酬宾。

current_entries.en_definition: The act of putting up for auction to the highest bidder.
(US) A tavern, especially in an American Old West setting.
(anime, _, and, _, manga, fandom) Appended to a person's name or nickname to convey honour and respect.

A chemical element (symbol Sm) with an atomic number of 62, a moderately hard silvery metal that slowly oxidizes in air. Applications in human affairs include magnets with high performance at high temperatures, which are important in military equipment.
An island of the Bahamas, possibly the same as Columbus's island.
An island of Galapagos, Ecuador; formerly, San Marcos (pre-1892), Salvador (from 1892), and San Salvador (from 1892).
The wood just under the bark of a stem or branch; it differs from the heartwood in color and in physiologic activity (flow of sap).
(clothing) A decorative length of cloth worn over the shoulder to the opposite hip, often for ceremonial or other formal occasions.
Pleasantly satisfied or full, as with food; sated
(transitive) To cook (food) using a small amount of fat in an open pan over a relatively high heat, allowing the food to brown and form a crust stopping it from sticking to the pan as it cooks.
A proverb or maxim.

examples.english: I'm just saying!
examples.chinese: 我只是说说而已！

current_entries.en_definition: A metallic chemical element, atomic number 21, obtained from some uranium ores; it is a transition element.
(degree) Hardly: only just; by a small margin.

examples.english: Scarcely an hour goes by that I don't I think of you with love.
examples.chinese: 我幾乎沒有一個小時不滿懷愛意地想著你。

current_entries.en_definition: A distinctive smell.
The sense of smell.
(obsolete) Sense, perception.
(transitive) To detect the scent of; to discern by the sense of smell.
A systematic plan of future action. [from 18th c.]

examples.english: Your help is indispensable for the success of the scheme.
examples.chinese: 沒有你幫忙，計劃就不能成功了。

current_entries.en_definition: A chart or diagram of a system or object.
(transitive) To plan; to contrive; to manuever.
A surname from German.
A group of people who share common characteristics of opinion or outlook of a philosophy.
That scintillates.
The heir to a throne.
(botany) A detached shoot or twig containing buds from a woody plant, used in grafting; a shoot or twig in a general sense.

(transitive, inseparable, idiomatic, slang) To defeat (especially in an argument), get the better of, achieve a success over, gain an advantage or win points over, make a point to the detriment or at the expense of, make appear foolish. Sometimes with particle on (someone).
(intransitive, originally, US, often, imperative) To leave in a hurry; to go away. [from early 20th c.]
A loud, emphatic, exclamation of extreme emotion, especially horror, fear, excitement, or anger; it may comprise a word or a sustained, high-pitched vowel sound.
(intransitive, also, figuratively) To cry out with a shrill voice; to utter a sudden, sharp outcry, or shrill, loud cry, as in fright or extreme pain; to screech, to shriek.
Someone who writes; a draughtsperson; a writer for another; especially, an official or public writer; an amanuensis, secretary, notary, or copyist.
To write, engrave, or mark upon; to inscribe.
(intransitive) To work as a sculptor.
A short, erect tail, as of a hare, rabbit, or deer.
A transuranic chemical element (symbol Sg) with atomic number 106.
An attempt to find something.

examples.english: More than 90 percent of visits to a web page are from search engines.
examples.chinese: 一个网页超过百分之九十的访问量是来自于搜索引擎的。

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive, followed by "for") To look thoroughly.
